name: LEGO — Long Tail (industry archetype + Factory + Ideas)
description: Three Business Model Canvases tracing how a 90-year-old physical-product company applied the Long Tail pattern in two distinct ways: LEGO Factory (2005-2014, custom POD) and LEGO Ideas (2008-present, community-curated). Companion to lulu-com — same pattern, very different physical/digital extremes.
